ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "code" INTEGER /* Unique code for each match */,
  "deadline_time" TEXT /* Deadline time for the match */,
  "kickoff_time" TEXT /* Kickoff time for the match */,
  "event" INTEGER /* Event type (e.g., league, tournament) */,
  "event_day" INTEGER /* Day of the event */,
  "finished" INTEGER /* Whether the match is finished */,
  "finished_provisional" INTEGER /* Whether the match is provisionally finished */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Match duration in minutes */,
  "provisional_start_time" INTEGER /* Whether the match has a provisional start time */,
  "started" INTEGER /* Whether the match has started */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match is played */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, tournament, friendly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_difficulty" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_teams" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the team in the match */,
  "formation" TEXT /* Formation used by the team in the match */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "substitutes_used" INTEGER /* Number of substitutes used by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_players" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position_played" TEXT /* Position played by the player in the match */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "substitution_in_minute" INTEGER /* Minute the player was substituted in (if applicable) */,
  "substitution_out_minute" INTEGER /* Minute the player was substituted out (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., goals scored, assists) */,
  "stat_value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the statistic */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the statistic occurred */,
  "half" TEXT /* Half of the match (1st half, 2nd half, extra time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yellow_cards" (
  "yellow_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yellow card */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who received the yellow card */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute the yellow card was received */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the yellow card */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who issued the card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yellow_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yellow_cards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yellow_cards_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "red_cards" (
  "red_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each red card */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who received the red card */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute the red card was received */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the red card */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who issued the card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("red_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_red_cards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_red_cards_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who took the penalty */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute the penalty was taken */,
  "scored" INTEGER /* Whether the penalty was scored */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the penalty (e.g., foul, handball) */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who awarded the penalty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "saves" (
  "save_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each save */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who made the save */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute the save was made */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of save (e.g., dive, parry) */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance from which the save was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("save_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_saves_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_saves_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bonus" (
  "bonus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bonus */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who received the bonus */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the bonus */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of bonus (e.g., man of the match, assist bonus) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the bonus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bonus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonus_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonus_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bps" (
  "bps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each BPS entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who received BPS */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the BPS */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of BPS points (e.g., offensive, defensive) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the BPS points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bps_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bps_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Predicted outcome of the match */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence in the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the machine learning model used for prediction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
